sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5889" key="a)mfikome/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφικομέω</orth>, <sense id="n5889.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tend on all sides</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">carefully,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.141</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antiphil.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
